app.name: Wix Scanner
app.tagline: Fast, reliable event check-in for Wix-powered venues

layout.title: Project skeleton ready
layout.description: Backend health, translated UI strings, and the operator shell are wired for rapid feature work.

home.title: Welcome
home.description: This starter uses Spanish by default and includes shadcn-style building blocks.

hero.title: Run check-in from one clear command center
hero.description: Monitor event readiness, integration health, and webhook flow without opening developer panels.

dashboard.quickActionsDescription: Jump to scanning, refresh integrations, and review latest deliveries.
dashboard.healthDescription: A compact overview of what needs attention before doors open.

webhook.title: Webhook Delivery History
webhook.description: Monitor Wix mobile check-in webhooks and trigger manual retries for failed deliveries.

bindings.title: Site-Event Binding Admin
bindings.description: Bind Wix sites to events, verify app installation, and only activate verified events.
bindings.activateError: Activation blocked: event has no verified binding

bindingHelp.title: How to complete site-event binding
bindingHelp.subtitle: Guide based on Wix MCP flows and Wix API references.
bindingHelp.step1Body: Use Wix MCP ListWixSites (or Wix dashboard site info) and copy the exact site ID for the event owner site.
bindingHelp.step2Body: Use Wix MCP events listing (Query/List Events) and copy the target event ID. Use the exact event used for check-in.
bindingHelp.step3Body: Enter site-id and event-id in this screen, then create binding. Run Verify to confirm site/event/app installation state.
bindingHelp.step4Body: Run scope verification after binding is verified. Required permissions are WIX_EVENTS.READ_TICKETS, WIX_EVENTS.CHECK-IN, and WIX_EVENTS.READ_EVENTS.

operator.title: Operator screen
operator.description: This route is ready for the kiosk UI and scanner workflow.
operator.idleMessage: Please present your QR code or ticket to the scanner
operator.emptyHistory: No scans in this session yet
operator.focusLost: Window focus was lost. Keep operator screen active.
operator.webhidUnavailable: WebHID is unavailable. Keyboard capture fallback is active.
operator.manifestStale: Local ticket cache is stale. Validation is degraded.
operator.offlineQueued: Backend unavailable. Scan marked as offline queue.

bootstrap.waitingSubtitle: Present the bootstrap QR to the scanner to activate this kiosk
bootstrap.sessionCleared: Session cleared. Scan bootstrap QR to re-activate.
bootstrap.sessionExpired: Kiosk session expired. Scan the bootstrap QR to re-activate.
bootstrap.notEnrolledError: Kiosk is not enrolled. Scan the bootstrap QR first.

toasts.welcome: Sonner is ready for operator notifications.
